```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# Function to get information from the Metropolitan Museum of Art's collection
def get_met_museum_portrait(accession_number):
    url = f"https://www.metmuseum.org/art/collection/search/{accession_number}"
    response = requests.get(url)
    response.raise_for_status()
    return response.text

# Specific accession number 29.100.5
accession_number = "29.100.5"
search_results = get_met_museum_portrait(accession_number)

# Parsing the search results
soup = BeautifulSoup(search_results, 'html.parser')
title = soup.find('h2', class_='card__title').get_text()
artist = soup.find('span', class_='card__artist').get_text()
date = soup.find('span', class_='card__date').get_text()
description = soup.find('div', class_='card__description').get_text()

# Printing the details of the portrait
print(f"Title: {title}")
print(f"Artist: {artist}")
print(f"Date: {date}")
print(f"Description: {description}")
```
